title: PictureBox Properties
description:
PictureBox Properties

PictureBox Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the PictureBox control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

BorderStyle	Determines the Border style of the control.

Default: 0 -
		 None

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	The type of task used for events.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Default:

Image	Specifies the image to be displayed.
		  To delete, press the [Delete] key.

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 PictureBox control.

Default: PictureBoxXX

SizeMode	Indicates how the image is displayed.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

ToolTipText	Sets the text
		 for the tooltip.

Default:

Top	Sets the location of the top of the
		 PictureBox control.

Default:

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the PictureBox control.

Default:

Events	Description

Click	Executes when the user clicks the control
		 with the mouse.

DblClick	Executes when the user double clicks
		 the control with the mouse.
